top_signals.title: UK financial regulators to begin overseeing Critical Third Parties announced by HM Treasury
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England, the Prudential Regulation Authority and the Financial Conduct Authority will start overseeing the first Critical Third Parties on Monday 13 July 2026, following designation by HM Treasury.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Statistical Notice 2026/07 -  Bank of England Levy: Notification Document Levy Year 2026/27
top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hugging Face warns an autonomous AI agent hacked its network
top_signals.summary: The Hugging Face artificial intelligence repository disclosed that attackers gained access to internal datasets and credentials after breaching its production infrastructure using an autonomous AI agent system. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
top_signals.summary: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Letter from the Governor to Joe Powell MP
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Update on the Digital Gilt Instrument (DIGIT) pilot issuance
top_signals.summary: The Chancellor announced that DIGIT will be issued by Q1 2027, and the government is taking steps to prepare for potential future issuances. HSBC and LSEG have signed an MoU to develop connectivity together to support investor access.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Markets First Panda Bonds as It Diversifies Funding
top_signals.summary: Indonesia has begun marketing its inaugural yuan-denominated bonds in China’s domestic debt market, as Southeast Asia’s largest economy seeks to diversify funding sources amid currency volatility and fiscal challenges.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statutory guidance: Public Service Pensions and Judicial Offices Act: Amending Directions - July 2026
top_signals.summary: Amendments to Treasury Directions made under the Public Service Pensions and Judicial Offices Act 2022 in relation to the McCloud remedy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Shares of SBI Funds Management jump nearly 9% in country’s largest listing so far this year

top_signals.summary: Facilities management group is latest London-listed company to agree a deal

top_signals.summary: Whoever wins the presidential race will have to face up to the need for fiscal consolidation

alerts.title: New York imports more electricity from Canada after high-voltage transmission line opens
alerts.summary: On July 3, 2026, the New York Independent System Operator (NYISO) imported 52 gigawatthours (GWh) of electricity from Canada, the most traded between the two areas since January 2025. Some of the imported electricity flowed along the new Champlain Hudson Power Express (CHPE) transmission line between Quebec, Canada, and New York City, which officially reached commercial operations in May after three years of construction.
